description: Housing levy deduction for the employer
name: Employer Housing Levy

description: This is uniform allowance for security staff
name: Uniform Allowance

description: This is overtime for non-management staff
name: Overtime

description: Deductions for emergency loans taken from sacco
name: Sacco Emergency Loan

description: Medical deduction for staff exceeding their limit
name: Medical Deduction

formula: custom_employee_basic_salary * 0.02 if employment_type not in ["Management", "S. management"] else 0
name: KPAWU

formula: 1500 if (employment_type or "") in ["Management", "S. management"] else 650 if (employment_type or "") in ["Annual Contract", "Permanent", "Seasonal"] else 0
name: Travel Allowance

description: This is the housing allowance per month
name: Cash Housing Allowance

description: Will handle wrongly paid amounts in previous payroll
name: Payroll Recoveries

description: Deduction for buying shares in a sacco
name: Sacco Shares

description: Paid to any employee going on annual leave
name: Leave Travel Allowance

description: Deduction made for sacco registration for employees
name: Sacco Registration

description: Failure to serve notice when leaving the company
name: Notice Deduction

description: Deduction for telephone bills exceeding the allowed limit
name: Telephone Deduction

description: Third part deductions for mobile loans
name: Okolea Cash

description: This for employees based in Nairobi
name: Transport Allowance

description: Deduction for Sacco loans for employees
name: Sacco Loan

description: Deduction for medical bills exceeding limit
name: Dental Bill Recovery

description: This is the fixed bank allowance for all employees paid through bank transfer
name: Bank Allowance

description: This is the acting allowance and is 25% of the basic pay of the person being relieved.
name: Acting Allowance

description: Based on use of staff transport
name: Transport Deduction
